arts.ttl: Lazio Mathematically Seal Qualification for Europa League Knockout Stage
arts.sum: Despite settling for a draw against Ludogorets, Lazio have already booked their place in the Europa League knockout stages. Ending the Perfect Run The Biancocelesti enjoyed a resounding start to their European campaign this season, winning their first four fixtures at the expense of Dynamo Kyiv, OGC Nice, FC Twente and Porto. arts.ttl: Lazio Winger Reveals Referee’s Explanation on Controversial Penalty Incident vs Ludogorets
arts.sum: Gustav Isaksen reveals how the referee explained himself after denying Lazio what seemed to be a clear penalty kick in the Europa League contest against Ludogorets which ended in a goalless draw.
